title: Insane 3-Crown Miner Control Deck | Clash Royale
description: Full breakdown of a Miner Control deck taking three crowns in ladder. Elixir management, tower targeting, and win conditions explained.
thumbnail_prompt: Explosive Clash Royale arena, Miner peeking from ground, bold '3 CROWNS' text, high-contrast red and gold, shocked reaction face
long_script: What's up everyone, today we're running one of the most consistent control decks in the current meta...

shorts.title: This Miner Trick Wins Games
shorts.script: Place the Miner on the back of the tower, not the front. Here's why it out-values every counter...
shorts.hook: You've been placing Miner wrong this whole time.

shorts.title: Elixir Leak = Instant Loss
shorts.script: Never let your elixir hit ten. Watch how one leak here throws the entire push...
shorts.hook: Stop leaking elixir and start winning.
